Vulkan validation layer runtime binaries vendored for AshEngine Windows x64 Debug validation.

Source:
- C:\VulkanSDK\1.4.335.0\Bin

Files:
- layers/VkLayer_khronos_validation.json
- layers/VkLayer_khronos_validation.dll

The layer manifest keeps the SDK-relative library path:
`.\\VkLayer_khronos_validation.dll`.
